title: Die Schmetterlingsschlacht
writer: Rosa Porten, Willy Rath, Hermann Sudermann
actors: Asta Nielsen, Reinhold Schünzel, Hans Brausewetter
plot: Naive 16 year old Rosi paints butterfly pictures and day-dreams of a better world, abhorring the conducts of Else, Laura, Max and and immoral cavalier.
